services.name: AI Workflow Automation
services.description: Automates repetitive, multi-step business processes using AI agents that observe, reason, and act across existing tools.

services.name: Conversational AI & Chatbots
services.description: Custom AI chatbots and virtual assistants for customer support, internal helpdesks, and lead qualification.

services.name: AI Sales Outreach Agent
services.description: AI agent that researches prospects, personalizes outreach, and manages cold email/lead generation end-to-end.

services.name: Custom AI Model Development
services.description: Builds and fine-tunes bespoke AI/ML models tailored to a company's specific data and use case.

services.name: AI-Powered CRM & ERP Integration
services.description: Embeds AI directly into existing CRM/ERP systems for smarter data entry, forecasting, and recommendations.

services.name: Data Analytics & AI Insights
services.description: Turns raw business data into actionable insights and dashboards using AI-driven analysis.

services.name: Intelligent Document Processing
services.description: Extracts, classifies, and validates data from documents (invoices, certificates, contracts) using AI/OCR.

services.name: AI Consulting & Strategy
services.description: Advisory engagement to help enterprises identify high-impact AI use cases and build an adoption roadmap.
pain_points_addressed: Uncertainty on where to start with AI
